# PERF-203 positive: ip.String() called twice in a handler
lang: go
file: PERF-203-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"net"
	"net/http"
)

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	ip := net.ParseIP(r.RemoteAddr)
	if ip == nil {
		return
	}
	s1 := ip.String()
	s2 := ip.String()
	_, _ = s1, s2
}
